message:
feat(ffs-alloc): implement block/inode allocation (bd-zge.2)

mballoc-style block allocator with goal-directed placement (goal group,
nearby groups, full scan) and Orlov inode allocator (directories spread
across groups, files co-locate with parent). Bitmap operations, cached
group stats, and filesystem geometry helpers. 18 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
